app.name: linear-cli
app.one_liner: A CLI to list, start, and create issues in Linear without leaving the command line, with git/jj awareness and AI agent support.

screens.name: Issue List & Start
screens.purpose: Display and select issues to start working on, with context-aware filtering based on git/jj state.

rust_commands.name: api_raw
rust_commands.purpose: Provide raw GraphQL API access for advanced scripting and automation.

rust_commands.name: auth_login
rust_commands.purpose: Add workspace credentials by storing API key in ~/.config/linear/credentials.toml.

rust_commands.name: issue_create
rust_commands.purpose: Create a new Linear issue interactively with title, description, team, and other metadata.

rust_commands.name: issue_list
rust_commands.purpose: List unstarted issues assigned to the user or anyone, optionally filtered by cycle or other criteria.

rust_commands.name: issue_pr
rust_commands.purpose: Create a pull request with title and body preset using gh CLI, linked to the current Linear issue.

rust_commands.name: issue_start
rust_commands.purpose: Start working on an issue by creating a local branch and linking it to the Linear issue.

rust_commands.name: issue_view
rust_commands.purpose: Render the current branch's associated Linear issue as markdown in the terminal.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement core issue listing and starting commands
acceptance_tests: Attachment view shows sourceType (e.g., Slack, GitHub)
Auth login correctly stores credentials in ~/.config/linear/credentials.toml
Flag conflict between --parent and --priority is resolved
Issue relation command manages dependencies between issues
Issue start command no longer creates extra commit after describing
Raw GraphQL API access works via 'linear api' subcommand
Sub-issues display limit increased from 50 to 250 in issue view
User can list all issues from the current cycle with 'linear issue list'
